description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named facebook/redex/build_and_test that can be called as a workflow. It should have a Linux GCC job running on a 4-core Ubuntu environment with a containerized Debian OS, and a strategy matrix for different OS and build architectures. The job should install prerequisites, check out the repository, prepare Debian, and set up the build and test environment. Additionally, it should have two more jobs: one for building with Clang on Debian and another for building on Windows.
